description_long: This is a classic beaded necklace composed of uniformly sized, smooth, round white beads strung together in a continuous loop. The beads are likely made of polished stone, glass, or plastic, and are evenly spaced, creating a symmetrical and balanced appearance. At the top, a small metallic clasp is visible, which serves as the fastening mechanism for the necklace. The clasp appears to be a simple hook-and-eye or spring ring style, made of a gold or brass-colored metal. The overall design is minimalist, with no additional decorative elements or engravings. The necklace exudes a timeless and versatile aesthetic, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A minimalist beaded necklace with smooth, round white beads and a small metallic clasp. The design is simple, symmetrical, and elegant.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular arrangement of white beads and the metallic clasp at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the necklace as a straight vertical line of beads, highlighting their spherical shape and uniformity.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the full loop of beads and the clasp visible at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the necklace as a vertical line of beads, similar to view 1.
